title: paramignya surasiana
intro: Paramignya surasiana, also known as the Paramignya fruit or Paramignya tree, is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paramignya surasiana include the potential treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of the Paramignya tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
